statement.latex: Suppose that in a finite group$G$every maximal subgroup$M$is supersoluble whenever$(M)= (G)$, where$(G)$is the set of all prime divisors of the order of$G$. [r]{a)} What are the non-abelian composition factors of$G$? [r]{b)} Determine the exact upper bounds for the nilpotency length, the rank, and the$p$-length of$G$if$G$is soluble. { V.\,S.\,Monakhov} a) Every nonabelian finite simple group can o...
